name: Unnamed Project

files.filename: 新建 PPTX 演示文稿.pdf

entity_types.name: Company
entity_types.description: A for-profit business entity seeking or having undergone IPO, with public market exposure

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Official registered name of the company

attributes.name: industry_sector
attributes.description: Primary industry classification (e.g., cloud infrastructure, data center)

attributes.name: ipo_status
attributes.description: Current IPO phase: 'pre-filing', 'in-review', 'post-IPO', or 'abandoned'

entity_types.name: RegulatoryAgency
entity_types.description: Government or quasi-government body responsible for securities oversight and IPO approval

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Official name of the regulatory authority

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: Geographic or functional scope (e.g., 'China', 'CSRC')

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News organization or digital platform publishing IPO-related coverage and analysis

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the media brand or publication

attributes.name: media_type
attributes.description: Format: 'financial_news', 'social_media', 'state_media', 'independent_blog'

entity_types.name: InvestmentBank
entity_types.description: Financial institution acting as underwriter, advisor, or sponsor in IPO process

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Full legal or commonly recognized name

attributes.name: role_in_ipo
attributes.description: Specific function: 'lead_underwriter', 'joint_bookrunner', 'financial_advisor'

entity_types.name: Shareholder
entity_types.description: Entity or individual holding significant equity stake pre-IPO, influencing narrative and credibility

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Legal or publicly known name of shareholder

attributes.name: shareholding_percentage
attributes.description: Approximate equity stake held (e.g., '28.5%')

entity_types.name: IndustryAnalyst
entity_types.description: Professional researcher or commentator providing expert assessment on company fundamentals and se...

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Name of analyst or research lead

attributes.name: affiliation
attributes.description: Institutional base (e.g., 'CCID Consulting', 'Gartner')

examples: Zhang Wei, CCID Cloud Infrastructure Analyst
Li Na, iResearch Senior Tech Analyst

entity_types.name: PublicFigure
entity_types.description: Influential individual (e.g., founder, CEO, spokesperson) whose statements directly shape IPO per...

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Legal or widely used public name

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Formal role at the company or in public discourse

examples: Wang Jian, Founder & CEO of Youfu Cloud
Chen Lin, Former CTO and Public Spokesperson

entity_types.name: InstitutionalInvestor
entity_types.description: Professional investment entity evaluating and potentially subscribing to IPO shares

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of fund, insurance company, or sovereign wealth fund

attributes.name: investment_focus
attributes.description: Sector or strategy alignment (e.g., 'tech infrastructure', 'ESG-aligned')

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any natural person not covered by more specific types (e.g., anonymous netizens, commentators, em...

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Real or pseudonymous identifier used publicly

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: Contextual identity (e.g., 'former employee', 'retail investor', 'online commentator')

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any formal group not captured by more specific organizational types (e.g., trade associations, th...

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Recognized name of the entity

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: Stated mission or operational focus

edge_types.name: SUBMITS_TO
edge_types.description: Company submits IPO application or materials to regulatory agency

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media outlet publishes news, analysis, or opinion about the company's IPO

edge_types.name: ADVISES_ON
edge_types.description: Investment bank provides underwriting, valuation, or procedural guidance for IPO

edge_types.name: HOLDS_STAKE_IN
edge_types.description: Shareholder owns equity in the company prior to IPO

edge_types.name: ANALYZES
edge_types.description: Industry analyst issues research or commentary on company’s financials, tech, or market position

edge_types.name: REPRESENTS
edge_types.description: Public figure serves as official voice or symbolic representative of the company

edge_types.name: EVALUATES_FOR_INVESTMENT
edge_types.description: Institutional investor conducts due diligence and considers subscription to IPO

edge_types.name: COMMENTED_ON
edge_types.description: Person posts public commentary (e.g., on social media) regarding IPO credibility or risks

edge_types.name: AFFILIATED_WITH
edge_types.description: Organization collaborates with, advises, or is formally linked to the company (non-equity)

analysis_summary: 文本聚焦于有孚公司（Youfu Cloud）上市前的舆论环境，核心涉及IPO主体、监管方、媒体、投行、股东、分析师、创始人/高管、机构投资者等可发声实体。设计严格遵循‘现实主体’原则：所有类型均为能在社交媒体或公开渠道主动表态、发布内容、影响舆论的角色。兜底类型Person和Organization确保覆盖未被具体归类的个体与组织，符合模拟系统扩展性需求。
simulation_requirement: 帮助看看有孚公司上市前的舆论导向和应对机制
